dj_text: Can we get much higher? YES! That Pirate Bot DJ Radio! That was Stayin' Alive (Medieval Cover). Now settling into Bad Boys (Medieval Cover). Two more waiting in the wings.
commercial_text: Brought to you by NoodleCorp — we put noodles in everything. Noodle soup. Noodle salad. Noodle coffee. Noodle mattress.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Bad Boys (Medieval Cover)
